contents:
# 2026 Korea Defense Symposium and Exposition held at Camp Humphreys

## Overview
The 2026 Korea Defense Symposium and Exposition (KORDEF) took place, highlighting the role of land forces in Korean defense. Gen. Moon Byeong Sam, Combined Forces Command Deputy Chief of Staff, delivered remarks at the event. It featured discussions and displays related to regional security.[3]

## Details
The event occurred at Camp Humphreys in Pyeongtaek, Gyeonggi Province. It included multiple images documenting the symposium and exposition activities. Gen. Moon's speech focused on land forces' contributions to the US-ROK alliance. KORDEF served as a platform for defense experts and military leaders. No specific casualty, equipment, or agreement details remained reported. The symposium underscored ongoing combined defense efforts.[3]

**Location**: Camp Humphreys, South Korea

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @TheKorea_Times, which covers Korea defense, North Korea, US-ROK alliance, security policy. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Korea defense will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
